name: python-squarelet

metadata.name: python-squarelet
metadata.summary: Python library that handles token authentication for MuckRock and DocumentCloud

documentation:
# python-squarelet
Python wrapper for Squarelet, allowing for authentication and providing a request interface

modules.name: python-squarelet.exceptions
documentation: Custom exceptions for python-squarelet

classes.name: python-squarelet.exceptions.SquareletError
documentation: Base class for errors for python-squarelet

classes.name: python-squarelet.exceptions.DuplicateObjectError
documentation: Raised when an object is added to a unique list more than once

classes.name: python-squarelet.exceptions.CredentialsFailedError
documentation: Raised if unable to obtain an access token due to bad login credentials

classes.name: python-squarelet.exceptions.APIError
documentation: Any other error calling an API

classes.name: python-squarelet.exceptions.DoesNotExistError
documentation: Raised when the user asks the API for something it cannot find

classes.name: python-squarelet.exceptions.MultipleObjectsReturnedError
documentation: Raised when the API returns multiple objects when it expected one

modules.name: python-squarelet.__init
documentation: Import core fuctionality

modules.name: python-squarelet.squarelet
documentation: python-squarelet handles authentication and requests to MuckRock services

classes.name: python-squarelet.squarelet.SquareletClient

methods.name: python-squarelet.squarelet.SquareletClient.__init__
documentation: pylint: disable=too-many-arguments, too-many-positional-arguments

methods.name: python-squarelet.squarelet.SquareletClient._set_tokens
documentation: Set the refresh and access tokens

methods.name: python-squarelet.squarelet.SquareletClient._get_tokens
documentation: Get an access and refresh token in exchange for the username and password

methods.name: python-squarelet.squarelet.SquareletClient._refresh_tokens
documentation: Refresh the access and refresh tokens

methods.name: python-squarelet.squarelet.SquareletClient._request
documentation: Generic method to make API requests

methods.name: python-squarelet.squarelet.SquareletClient.set_request_kwargs
documentation: Allow clients to customize request kwargs (e.g., adding headers)

methods.name: python-squarelet.squarelet.SquareletClient.__getattr__
documentation: Generate methods for each HTTP request type (GET, POST, etc.)

methods.name: python-squarelet.squarelet.SquareletClient.requests_retry_session
documentation: Automatic retries for HTTP requests

methods.name: python-squarelet.squarelet.SquareletClient.raise_for_status
documentation: Raise for status with a custom error class
Handles token auth and requests
pylint: disable=too-many-instance-attributes
